words.meaning_en: A minor illness or chronic complaint

words.example_sentence: She travelled to the mountains to recuperate after the surgery.

words.meaning_en: To relieve the symptoms of a disease without curing it; to make less severe

one_word_sub.question: The body's natural or acquired ability to resist a particular disease or infection
